commits.message:
feat(showcase): self-heal stale COI service workers across versions

Multi-version gh-pages deploys can leave a coi-serviceworker.js registered for
a sibling version subdir, blocking the current page from going cross-origin-
isolated. Bump showcase-kit to ba4b197 (which adds bootstrapCoi) and call it
in main.tsx before mount so the unregister-and-reload happens before any
CheerpX-touching component reads SharedArrayBuffer.
ci(showcase): add gh-pages-multiplexer for versioned deploys

fix(showcase): use HttpBytesDevice for flat ext2

CloudDevice.create() expects CheerpX's chunked CDN protocol (the format
disks.webvm.io serves). Our self-hosted ext2 is a flat file behind plain
HTTP range requests, which is what HttpBytesDevice handles. Wrong device
type was the entire reason mounts hung — image content was always fine.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

fix(showcase): allow ptydriver install on buster's Python 3.7

CheerpX boots only on Debian buster (glibc 2.28). ptydriver metadata
declares >=3.8 but the code is pure-Python and runs on 3.7 cleanly, so
pip --ignore-requires-python and pin pip<24 (24+ enforces metadata).

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

feat(showcase): point disk image at webvm.tinkerpad.ai CORS proxy

GitHub Releases redirects to release-assets.githubusercontent.com which
returns no Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy header. In a coi-isolated context
the browser blocks any cross-origin response without CORP — including the
service worker's own upstream fetch. The webvm.tinkerpad.ai Cloudflare
Worker (in showcase-kit/webvm/cf-worker) sits in front of the Release and
adds the headers CheerpX needs.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

feat: add gh-pages showcase with real Linux + ptydriver in browser

Vite app deployed to gh-pages that boots a Debian rootfs via CheerpX,
preinstalls ptydriver into a venv, and exposes three demo scripts driving
vim, fzf, and a Python REPL through a real PTY. Visitors can run the demos,
read the source, and drop into an interactive python3 to try the API
directly — same canonical ptydriver code, no JS port.

Composes from showcase-kit's <WebVMTerminal>; image is built by
showcase-kit/webvm/build-image.sh and published as a Release on this repo.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

chore: add commitizen and pre-commit for conventional commits

- Add commitizen for interactive commit message generation
- Add pre-commit with commit-msg hook to enforce conventional commits
- Configure commitizen in pyproject.toml with version tracking

feat: add changelog generation and improve code quality

- Add CHANGELOG.md with release history
- Add cliff.toml for git-cliff changelog generation
- Update justfile with changelog recipes and fix release command
- Add twine and strict mypy to dev dependencies
- Add py.typed marker for PEP 561 compliance
- Fix type annotations and code style throughout
- Remove broken ProcessPool.expect_any/expect_sequence methods
Add justfile with build, test, clean, release, and lint recipes
